plugins.name: zotero-citations
plugins.description: Zotero-backed live in-text citations + auto References (pandoc + citeproc, any CSL) and a custom chronological Legislation & case-law list.

plugins.name: scriere
plugins.description: Edit a Word (.docx) manuscript as tracked changes (author "Claude") via a reliable lxml round-trip — suggestions the author accepts/rejects, plus threaded comment replies, footnotes, and a voice-preserving proofreading pass.
